summary: Critical Italian tax hold notification translation fix testing completed. Found translation logic working but identified blocking language field bug.

critical_bugs.issue: Language field sent during signup is NOT saved to database - all users have language='NOT_SET' instead of chosen language
critical_bugs.location: server.py lines 276-282, UserCreate object missing language parameter
critical_bugs.impact: All notifications sent in English regardless of user language preference
critical_bugs.suggested_fix: Update UserCreate object to include language=user_data.language parameter

working_features.test_result: Successfully places tax hold with proper admin authorization
Successfully removes tax hold with proper admin authorization

working_features.location: server.py lines 1983-1997 (tax hold creation) and 2052-2066 (tax hold removal)
working_features.test_result: Code checks user_doc.get('language', 'en') and sends Italian notifications when language='it'
Application loads successfully, login form accessible, no errors on page load
Language switcher visible in top navigation (EN/IT toggle)

passed_tests: Translation logic implemented in backend code
Admin can access user management functions

action_item_for_main_agent.critical_fix_required: Update signup process to save language field to database
action_item_for_main_agent.required_fix: UserCreate(email=user_data.email, password=user_data.password, first_name=user_data.first_name, last_name=user_data.last_name, phone=user_data.phone, language=user_data.language)
action_item_for_main_agent.impact: Without this fix, ALL users will receive English notifications regardless of their Italian language preference
action_item_for_main_agent.verification: After fix, create Italian user and verify language field is saved as 'it' in database

success_percentage.backend: 85% - Translation logic works but language field storage broken
success_percentage.overall: 80% - Main functionality works but critical language bug blocks Italian notifications
